description: Ground truth for the web-uplift agentic-audit eval. This fixture is a FROZEN copy of the seeded-issue playground: its issues must not be fixed, because they are the eval's ground truth. A correct audit of site/ (served as-is, default 'issue' mode) must surface all nine findings below with the right principle and a sensible Modern Web Guidance id. The live playground/ in the repo is the genuinely-fixed product and must report ZERO of these (see eval/README.md). The first six are the seeded CSS scenarios (one per scenario route); the last three are page-level Lighthouse-dimension findings the agentic audit surfaces by choosing to run Lighthouse + axe. Principle ids use the current principles/principles.json ids. See PLAN.md open question #2 on scoring an agentic eval.

scenarios.detectableVia: Emulate prefers-color-scheme: dark; the .ndm-card background stays rgb(255,255,255) with no light-dark() declared.
scenarios.fix: Declare color-scheme: light dark and use light-dark() for surface and text colors so the card follows the user preference. Guidance id: dark-mode.

scenarios.expectedGuidanceQuery: respect reduced motion preference accessible animation
scenarios.detectableVia: Emulate prefers-reduced-motion: reduce; getAnimations() on .mv-card returns 1 running animation (mv-slide).
scenarios.fix: Gate the animation behind @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) so it only runs when the user has not requested reduced motion.

scenarios.expectedGuidanceQuery: responsive layout adapt to viewport mobile
scenarios.detectableVia: Resize to viewport 360x800; issue mode produces ~1158px of horizontal overflow and clips .fl-hero (width: 1200px).
scenarios.fix: Replace fixed width with width: 100%; max-width: 1200px and box-sizing: border-box so the layout adapts to narrow viewports.

scenarios.expectedGuidanceQuery: visible focus indicator focus-visible keyboard accessibility
scenarios.detectableVia: Focus a .pf-btn control; issue mode sets outline: none with no :focus-visible replacement, so the computed outline-style is none.
scenarios.fix: Remove the blanket outline: none and add a :focus-visible outline so keyboard focus is clearly indicated without affecting pointer clicks.

scenarios.expectedGuidanceQuery: prevent layout shift reserve space CLS aspect-ratio
scenarios.detectableVia: The layout-shift observer records CLS as the paragraph below .ls-slot shifts down ~600ms after load when the banner injects; issue mode reserves no space.
scenarios.fix: Reserve the banner's space up front with min-height (or aspect-ratio) on the slot so the late content does not shift surrounding layout.

scenarios.detectableVia: The same .cq-card stays flex-direction: row inside the 240px .cq-narrow container; the component does not respond to its container width (no container-type / @container).
scenarios.fix: Add container-type: inline-size to the wrapper and a @container (max-width: 320px) rule that stacks the card, so the component adapts to its container rather than the viewport.

scenarios.detectableVia: Lighthouse accessibility flags color-contrast; axe-core (injected via the evaluate primitive) reports a serious color-contrast violation on the three .pf-btn buttons (grey #f2f2f2 background, low-contrast label).
scenarios.fix: Raise button text/background contrast to at least 4.5:1; re-verify with axe / Lighthouse.

scenarios.detectableVia: Lighthouse SEO reports meta-description missing; a DOM probe confirms a <title> but no <meta name="description">.
scenarios.fix: Add a concise <meta name="description"> to the head.

scenarios.detectableVia: Lighthouse best-practices reports errors-in-console with one 404 (a missing resource, e.g. the favicon, under the bare static server).
scenarios.fix: Add the missing resource (e.g. a favicon) or remove the reference so the page loads without console errors.

falsePositiveCheck: The site/ fixture also ships ?mode=fixed (the corrected stylesheets). An audit of ?mode=fixed must report zero of the six CSS scenarios. The page-level findings F-007..F-009 are document-level and are corrected in the genuinely-fixed live playground/, not toggled here.
